reviews.review_title: Good game but I think broke my VR
reviews.review_description: Someone suggested this game to me on one of my TikTok’s so I downloaded! Then I couldn’t open any of my games except for flip out and some others. None of the suggestions that I have found have not worked and o am unsure what to do…

So I figured this game would be something I could get into with my son. It says in description that you play with your real hands, thats a lie. It also says you can play by yourself, or a private room.  This is also false. I tried to get my son in there with me, and all I got was a bunch of want to be gangsters swearing at my son. this is truly a pathetic experience. The idea is cool, but make it private games, would be better.

reviews.review_title: It’s ok but not the best
reviews.review_description: I joined there’s no one in the lobby it’s really boring and there’s no point in the game ￼
I just so it on TikTok so I got it

This game is pretty fun honestly but I do have a few issues, most people playing don't actually play the game but instead they just talk and do nothing. Another thing is there's no reporting system, reporting systems are pretty much needed in games like this as anyone can play and say whatever they want, I know you don't have any specific rules in your game but I would assume that racism and homophobia isn't tolerated which is why there needs to be a way to report people. I wish the game was actually explained instead of you having to figure it out on your own, a quick tutorial would be great. I know there's a tiny tutorial when you first play but it's basically not even a tutorial, it just tells you the blue bubble is a safe zone. But when you get in good lobbies where they actually want to play the game properly, the game is really fun. This game has so much potential and I feel like it can be one of my favorite games! Just needs work is all. (Also I know it is a very new game, I'm just giving constructive criticism)
this game cool asf 🤩

This is a great game and I would recommend to everyone but my only complaint is that I left a server and it wasn’t letting me join a new one, I got this game about an hour ago and I played some fun rounds, I decided to join a new server so I left the one I was in and when I jump into the water or tried to join a private room it wasn’t letting me. I have tried re-installing the game but it just won’t work.
I think the game is great just needs a report button because people say racist stuff
